The Wild Robot (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $144,564,905Details
International Box Office $190,658,268
Worldwide Box Office $335,223,173
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,212,646
Total $1,212,646
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A robot—ROZZUM unit 7134, “Roz” for short—is shipwrecked on an uninhabited island and must learn to adapt to the harsh surroundings, gradually building relationships with the animals on the island and becoming the adoptive parent of an orphaned gosling.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$35,790,150 (24.8% of total gross)
Legs:4.04 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$78,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,962 opening theaters/3,997 max. theaters, 8.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $152,794,243

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 27th, 2024 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: September 13th, 2024 (Wide), released as The Wild Robot (Дивият робот) (Bulgaria)
September 19th, 2024 (Wide) (Venezuela)
September 19th, 2024 (Wide) (Uruguay)
September 19th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
September 19th, 2024 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: October 15th, 2024 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for action/peril and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2843 (cert #55020), 7/17/2024)
Running Time: 102 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Filming location (country): United States

Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure

Production Countries: United States

Synopsis

A robot—ROZZUM unit 7134, “Roz” for short—is shipwrecked on an uninhabited island and must learn to adapt to the harsh surroundings, gradually building relationships with the animals on the island and becoming the adoptive parent of an orphaned gosling.
